name: SEAR STEAKHOUSE OF THE BLACK HILLS

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Box of food on floor in walk in freezer.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Dispose of scratched teflon pans.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean slicer more thoroughly.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in beverage and main walk in cooler. -Clean lower shelf on table beside main walk in cooler.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Reached 155.6F on all 3 runs.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
